name: superteam
description: V4.7 main-session-as-orchestrator with the V4.7.2 conversation-flow + tool-set patches: Stop hook blocks main-session self-stop in execute/review/verify/finish stages when no specialist was spawned this turn, closing the V4.7.0/V4.7.1 coverage gap on the conversation-flow layer; specialist subagents (designer/architect/executor/verifier/reviewer/researcher/debugger/test-engineer) get MCP tool whitelists (pencil / chrome-devtools / playwright / context7 / gpt-researcher) so they can use the MCP servers the user has installed.
